ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the contract (e.g., NDA, Sales Agreement) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the contract document */,
  "contract_text" TEXT /* Full text of the contract */,
  "contract_template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract template used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contract */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the contract */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "entity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type (e.g., B-CONTRATO, I-CONTRATO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "entity_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the entity type (e.g., Contract Section, Party) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the entity type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entity type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the entity type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_text" TEXT /* Text of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template (e.g., NDA, Sales Agreement) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the template */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity type */,
  "entity_text" TEXT /* Text of the recognized entity */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the entity in the contract text */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the entity in the contract text */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the entity recognition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entity */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_entities_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_entities_entity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type_id") REFERENCES entity_types ("entity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity type */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the entity recognition model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the entity recognition model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the entity recognition model */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the entity type */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the entity recognition model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_entity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type_id") REFERENCES entity_types ("entity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legal analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contract */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, validate) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access event */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the revision */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_revisions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., Draft, Reviewed, Signed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the status entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the status entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_status_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of the party (e.g., Client, Vendor) */,
  "party_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the party */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the party was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the party */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the party was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_parties_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the object was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_objects_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit, validate, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details or description of the activity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the audit log entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the audit log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, validate) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
